programme.title: Victim of Nursing Home Abuse?
programme.desc: Have you or a family member been a victim of nursing home abuse?

programme.title: The Sunday Mass
programme.desc: Sunday religious service.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. The program can be seen in more than 100 countries. Osteen urges people to live at their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Amazing Facts
programme.desc: Bible study proclaims God's good news to the world.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: How to remain strong and avoid spiritual malnourishment.

programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: FOX Sports: Voices
programme.desc: Amon-Ra St. Brown empowers youth, Urban Meyer spotlights a military foundation, Mookie Betts earns the Roberto Clemente Award, and the Villanova Wildcats inspire through a special team manager.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR RaceDay
programme.desc: NASCAR fans get the very latest on the day's big race with this preview show featuring up-to-the-minute analysis, driver interviews, predictions and more. Host Shannon Spake is joined by analysts Chris Myers, Adam Alexander, Kaitlyn Vincie, and others.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series reaches Alabama for a 188-lap race at Talladega Superspeedway. Tyler Reddick looks to build on his recent win at Kansas, while Brad Keselowski seeks his second victory of the campaign at this 2.66-mile tri-oval circuit.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Proteins must be paired with perfectly poured beer to create delicious dishes; contestants play beer pong in order to win more ingredients.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: A colonoscopy reveals Peter has a rare collectible toy action figure lodged in his intestine, but the reward for selling it causes a rift between him and the guys.
